channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: OpenAI begins releasing its next generation of reasoning models with o3-mini
item.description: OpenAI released its newest reasoning model, called o3-mini, on Friday. OpenAI says the model delivers more intelligence than OpenAI’s first small reasoning model, o1-mini, while maintaining o1-mini’s low price and speed. The company says o3-mini excels in science, math, and coding problems.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Texas governor orders ban on DeepSeek, RedNote for government devices
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Texas Republican Gov. Greg Abbott issued a ban on Chinese artificial intelligence company DeepSeek for government-issued devices, becoming the first state to restrict the popular chatbot in such a manner.
item.dc:creator: NADIA LATHAN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Apple reports dip in iPhone sales over the holidays, despite AI rollout
item.description: Apple on Thursday disclosed its iPhone sales dipped slightly during the holiday-season quarter, signaling a sluggish start to the trendsetting company’s effort to catch up to the rest of Big Tech in the race to bring artificial intelligence to the masses.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: This tiny 2TB microSD card is at its lowest price ever, and Newegg is even willing to take an offer
item.description: Teamgroup 2TB Pro+ microSDXC delivers 160MB/s read speed and pricing flexibility with ongoing offers at Newegg.
item.dc:creator: udinmwenefosa@gmail.com (Efosa Udinmwen), TechRadar

item.title: I got a first look at the new Lego flower sets in a botanical garden, and the Mini Orchid should be on your list
item.description: Lego is celebrating its latest flower sets with a Botanical Garden pop-up, and we got to see the latest sets from the brand.
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: Capital One’s new AI agent will help you buy your next car
item.description: Capital One has launched an AI agent designed to help consumers with one of the most frustrating, time-consuming processes in life: buying a car. The banking giant’s Chat Concierge provides information, makes decisions, and takes action using multiple AI agents.
item.dc:creator: Jocelyn Mintz, Fast Company

item.title: World's first AI-designed, 3D-printed shoe wants to be the next Crocs
item.description: A startup claims to have developed the world's first entirely artificial intelligence-designed and 3D-printed shoe, the brainchild of a 25-year-old.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: President Trump to meet with Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang at the White House
item.description: President Donald Trump is meeting Friday with Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang, whose company designs and supplies the advanced computer chips that play an integral role in developing artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: Josh Boak, Kevin Freking And Sarah Parvini, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: A new Chrome browser highjacking attack could affect billions of users - here's how to fight it
item.description: There's a new highjacking attack that could take over your Chrome browser and steal all your data - here's how to keep your computer safe.
item.dc:creator: allisa.james@futurenet.com (Allisa James), TechRadar

item.title: Nvidia unveils preview of DeepSeek-R1 NIM microservice
item.description: Nvidia stock plummeted 17% on Monday after Chinese AI developer, DeepSeek, unveiled its DeepSeek-R1 LLM. On Thursday, the chipmaker turned around and announced the DeepSeek-R1 model is now available as a preview Nvidia inference microservice (NIM) on build.nvidia.com.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Microsoft makes OpenAI’s o1 model free for Copilot users
item.description: Microsoft AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman writes on LinkedIn that the company is now making OpenAI’s reasoning model o1 free to use for all users of Microsoft’s AI assistant Copilot. Microsoft calls the functionality itself “Think Deeper.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: VMware Fixes Critical Vulnerabilities in Cloud Management Platform
item.description: VMware fixes multiple high-severity vulnerabilities affecting its cloud management platform (CMP), VMware Aria, which could allow attackers to steal sensitive credentials from the virtualization giant's IT management and logging solutions.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: Enhancing Private 5G Security in industrial deployments
item.description: As digitisation gathers pace, manufacturers, energy companies, and transportation businesses are among the sectors increasingly turning to private 5G to connect their operational technology (OT) environments.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Opinion: AI is harming our children. California must step up
item.description: Will lawmakers again permit another addictive technology open to children and stand by as another generation gets hurt?
item.dc:creator: Robert C. Fellmeth, The Mercury News

item.title: Banco Sabadell evoluciona la experiencia digital de sus clientes
item.description: En los últimos años, a pesar de las estrictas regulaciones y el carácter sensible del sector, las organizaciones dedicadas a la banca y finanzas han dado pasos en firme en materia de transformación digital y adopción de nuevas tecnologías con el fin de mejorar la operativa del negocio y la experienc
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Microsoft 365: A guide to the updates
item.description: Microsoft 365 (and Office 365) subscribers get more frequent software updates than those who have purchased Office without a subscription, which means subscribers have access to the latest features, security patches, and bug fixes.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The quantum computing reality check
item.description: In late 2024, a major pharmaceutical company invested $50 million in quantum computing initiatives through a leading cloud provider, hoping to revolutionize their drug discovery process.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Renault Group strengthens decarbonisation commitment
item.description: Renault Group is committed to taking actions that help reduce its carbon footprint. By using HP IT Asset Disposition Service, the company’s end-of-use devices are securely collected, sanitised, and restored or responsibly recycled by HP.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Grim memories resurface after DNA advances lead to arrest of suspect in Hawaii teen's 1977 murder
item.description: The unsolved death of a teenager in 1977 haunted students and staff at Honolulu's McKinley High School for nearly half a century.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Sinco Kelleher, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: After a week of DeepSeek freakout, doubts and mysteries remain
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week here.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: RFK Jr. kept asking to see the science that vaccines were safe. After he saw it, he dismissed it
item.description: The man who hopes to be President Donald Trump’s health secretary says he needs to see data showing vaccines are safe, but he dismissed the evidence shown by an influential Republican senator.
item.dc:creator: Lauran Neergaard And Mike Stobbe, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Apple's iPhone sales during the holiday season slipped despite a highly anticipated AI rollout
item.description: Apple on Thursday disclosed its iPhone sales dipped slightly during the holiday-season quarter, signaling a sluggish start to the trendsetting company’s effort to catch up to the rest of Big Tech in the race to bring artificial intelligence to the masses.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Upstart Chinese AI company DeepSeek's founder started out as a low-key hedge fund entrepreneur
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — The 40-year-old founder of China’s DeepSeek, an AI startup that has startled markets with its capacity to compete with industry leaders like OpenAI, kept a low profile as he built up a hedge fund and then refined its quantitative models to branch into artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump says Microsoft is one of the companies eyeing TikTok
item.description: President Donald Trump said Monday evening that Microsoft is among the U.S. companies looking to take control of TikTok to help the popular app avert an effective ban that could kick-in in April.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Disabling, narrowing Apple Intelligence is just a few swipes away
item.description: A suite of artificial intelligence features is enabled automatically with Monday’s release of iOS 18.3.
item.dc:creator: Michael Ramsey, NewsNation

item.title: Sweden seizes vessel suspected of 'sabotage' after undersea data cable rupture in Baltic Sea
item.description: RIGA, Latvia (AP) — Swedish prosecutors announced Sunday night that they have opened a preliminary investigation into suspected aggravated “sabotage” and ordered the detention of a vessel in the Baltic Sea suspected of damaging an underwater fiber optic cable connecting Latvia and the Swedish island
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
